hooks.command: python evaluation/benchmarks/ebios_rules.py --check-file "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ Terminologie OK' || echo '⚠ Termes EBIOS 2010 détectés'
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(py|md)$'; then ruff check "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" --quiet 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ Lint OK' || echo '⚠ Lint errors'; fi
